title: Match Brackets
text: Match Brackets Specify whether Uniface should check for matching parentheses, braces, and brackets in this field. Value Description True Sets the BRM field syntax code, which requires brackets to be matched. False Uniface does not check for matching brackets. Description Uniface checks for an equal number of left and right brackets and that they are in the correct order. The matched brackets include: Parentheses: ( ) Braces: { } Brackets: [ ] Applies To Field Syntax Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
